scripts.start: concurrently "ng serve gateway --port 4200 --proxy-config proxy.conf.json" "ng serve admin --port 4201" "ng serve operator --port 4202"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:gateway && npm run build:admin && npm run build:operator
scripts.test: ng test gateway --watch=false && ng test admin --watch=false && ng test operator --watch=false && ng test shared --watch=false
scripts.test:watch: ng test gateway && ng test admin && ng test operator && ng test shared
scripts.test:coverage: ng test gateway --configuration=ci && ng test admin --configuration=ci && ng test operator --configuration=ci
scripts.lint: ng lint gateway && ng lint admin && ng lint operator && ng lint shared
scripts.lint:fix: ng lint gateway --fix && ng lint admin --fix && ng lint operator --fix && ng lint shared --fix
scripts.fix: npm run lint:fix && npm run format
scripts.i18n:extract: ng extract-i18n gateway --output-path projects/shared/src/locale --out-file gateway.xlf && ng extract-i18n admin --output-path projects/shared/src/locale --out-file admin.xlf && ng extract-i18n operator --output-path projects/shared/src/locale --out-file operator.xlf && node scripts/merge-xlf.mjs
